verses.text: The day of the LORD comes; He gathers all nations against Jerusalem, then 'shall the LORD go forth, and fight against those nations.' God's intervention. When His people are besieged, He Himself fights for them.

The day of the LORD comes; He gathers all nations against Jerusalem, then 'shall the LORD go forth, and fight against those nations.' God's intervention. When His people are besieged, He Himself fights for them.

The day of the LORD comes; He gathers all nations against Jerusalem, then 'shall the LORD go forth, and fight against those nations.' God's intervention. When His people are besieged, He Himself fights for them.
His feet shall stand on the mount of Olives, which shall cleave; the LORD 'shall come, and all the saints with thee.' Glorious advent. The Lord descends in power with His holy ones.
His feet shall stand on the mount of Olives, which shall cleave; the LORD 'shall come, and all the saints with thee.' Glorious advent. The Lord descends in power with His holy ones.
In that day the light is neither clear nor dark; 'living waters shall go out from Jerusalem,' summer and winter. Unfailing life. From God's city flows a river of life that never dries.
In that day the light is neither clear nor dark; 'living waters shall go out from Jerusalem,' summer and winter. Unfailing life. From God's city flows a river of life that never dries.
In that day the light is neither clear nor dark; 'living waters shall go out from Jerusalem,' summer and winter. Unfailing life. From God's city flows a river of life that never dries.
'The LORD shall be king over all the earth: in that day shall there be one LORD, and his name one'; Jerusalem dwells safely. Universal reign. God's kingdom shall fill the whole earth.
'The LORD shall be king over all the earth: in that day shall there be one LORD, and his name one'; Jerusalem dwells safely. Universal reign. God's kingdom shall fill the whole earth.
'The LORD shall be king over all the earth: in that day shall there be one LORD, and his name one'; Jerusalem dwells safely. Universal reign. God's kingdom shall fill the whole earth.
A plague shall consume the nations that fought Jerusalem, with great panic among them. Foes destroyed. Those who assail God's people meet a fearful end.
A plague shall consume the nations that fought Jerusalem, with great panic among them. Foes destroyed. Those who assail God's people meet a fearful end.
A plague shall consume the nations that fought Jerusalem, with great panic among them. Foes destroyed. Those who assail God's people meet a fearful end.
A plague shall consume the nations that fought Jerusalem, with great panic among them. Foes destroyed. Those who assail God's people meet a fearful end.
All left of the nations shall come up yearly to worship 'the King, the LORD of hosts,' and keep the feast. Nations worship. The survivors of judgment bow before the King.

All left of the nations shall come up yearly to worship 'the King, the LORD of hosts,' and keep the feast. Nations worship. The survivors of judgment bow before the King.
'In that day shall there be upon the bells of the horses, HOLINESS UNTO THE LORD'; every pot shall be holy. All made holy. In the end, common things and all of life are consecrated to God.
